title: THE HARNESS — per-target promptMode full (preset + settingSources + skills) vs lean (minimal string)

tests.summary: harness-ok — THE HARNESS block (5 tests) green: full → systemPrompt {type:'preset',preset:'claude_code'} + settingSources:['project'] + claudeMdLoaded + skillsMounted; lean → minimal system string + settingSources:[] + no CLAUDE.md + no skills; neither mode loads 'user' settings (#217 defence); full supports preset+append (appendSystemPrompt deprecated); defaultPromptModeForRole maps coding roles (expert/standard/review)→full and chat/media (fast/image)→lean. States asserted, never scraped.

notes: promptMode is also a margin lever — the full claude_code preset carries a fixed ~14k input-token floor per turn; lean targets stop paying it. The adapter wires harness.systemPrompt/settingSources into the SDK query options (asserted in buildQueryOptions test).
